rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pending Action And For Attornes Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $1,060.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 31, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT FAY SERVICING, LLC, WILMINGTON TRUST, Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pending Action And For Attornes Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $1,060.00 is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause For Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 31, 2019 line 1. Order To Show Cause For Temporary Restraining Order is continued to March 11, 2020. TRO shall remain in effect. On December 31, 2019, and on January 2, 2020, February 1, 2020 and March 1, 2020 Plaintiff shall post with the Court a payment in the amount equal to monthly mortgage payment. By no later than January 7, 2020 Plaintiff shall file Points and Authorities in support of its motion for preliminary injunction (and any evidence is applicable) addressing elements of preliminary injunction, including likelihood of prevailing on the merits based on the operative Second Amended Complaint. Opposition and reply briefs shall be due in accordance with March 11, 2020 hearing date. If Defendant's response to the Second Amended Complaint is something other than an answer, the hearing on the motion shall be calendared for March 11, 2020. If Plaintiff fails to make timely postings as specified above, Defendant may appear ex-parte to seek to dissolve the TRO. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 31, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF JULIANA CLEGG MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED, Second Amended Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. Trial is continued to July 22, 2020. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ALLEGRA STEPANZOFF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 31, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT ALLEGRA STEPANZOFF DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
